description: Checks whether the current user can edit annotations for a layer.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(source_type, 'user') = 'user' AND COALESCE(is_editable, true) = true AND owner_email = :current_user_email THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS can_edit FROM datastore:substage_label_layers_v3 WHERE layer_id = :layer_id AND COALESCE(status, 'active') = 'active' LIMIT 1) q
